name: feature-section-01
title: Feature Section 01 — header + icon card grid
description: Layout section, ships populated: left-aligned header block (heading / subtext / outline CTA) above a 2/3-column grid of six icon feature cards. Icon tiles are token-tinted divs with inline lucide SVGs; zero client JS. Customise by editing the FEATURES array and copy in the installed file.

files.content:
--- /** * FeatureSection-01.astro -- layout section: left-aligned header block * (heading / subtext / outline CTA) above a 2/3-column grid of icon * feature cards. Converted from a shadcn-studio features section: the * Avatar icon tile becomes a token-tinted div, per-card color props * become one neutral hover treatment, cards are plain markup (no Card * dep). Zero client JS. * * Ships populated (frontend-contract.md §7): * renders a complete block; make it yours by editing this copy you own. */ import { cn } from "../../../lib/utils"; import Button from "../Button.astro"; interface Props { class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; } const { class: className, ...rest } = Astro.props; /* Demo content -- swap for your own. Icon = inline lucide path(s). */ const FEATURES = [ { title: "Secure checkout", description: "Every transaction is encrypted end to end, with fraud monitoring that never sleeps.", icon: '', }, { title: "Instant search", description: "Find any product in milliseconds with typo-tolerant, filter-aware search.", icon: '', }, { title: "Lightning performance", description: "Static pages, zero hydration. The storefront paints before the coffee cools.", icon: '', }, { title: "Saved favourites", description: "Wishlists sync across devices, so the cart is ready wherever they come back.", icon: '', }, { title: "Flexible payments", description: "Cards, wallets, and instalments out of the box -- currencies handled for you.", icon: '', }, { title: "Buyer protection", description: "Clear returns and dispute resolution baked in, so trust compounds with every order.", icon: '', }, ]; ---

Discover the exclusive perks today

Explore key features designed to enhance your shopping experience with intuitive navigation, robust security, and seamless functionality.

{ FEATURES.map((f) => (

{f.title}

{f.description}

)) }
